canvas.diagram_reference_ratio: small semantic diagram inside wide margins

master_layout.border: none by default; only use a very faint inset border when explicitly requested
master_layout.title: centered medium restrained handwritten Chinese with pale blue underline
master_layout.title_scale_rule: body-page titles must keep the same optical size even when short
master_layout.subtitle: small centered subtitle beneath title
master_layout.corner_marks: very faint pale grey grid, dots, ruler ticks, or construction marks only
master_layout.spacing: large margins and calm negative space
master_layout.variation_policy: fixed outer shell across pages; vary only central semantic diagram area

text_budget.title: 5-12 Chinese characters preferred
text_budget.subtitle: 3-12 Chinese characters or three short terms separated by ·
text_budget.captions: 0-6 short captions, usually 2-6 Chinese characters each

style.objects: detailed object-based diagrams with pencil hatching
style.fills: very light marker-like pastel fills behind labels or tiny emphasis
style.characters: prefer 0; at most 1 tiny reader-proxy character far in a corner
style.text: short exact Chinese text baked into the final image
style.props: blank or simple line marks unless text is explicitly required

delivery.default: PNG page images plus contact sheet
delivery.out_of_scope: editable PPTX, image-based PPTX, PDF export, and presentation/document packaging
delivery.dimension_policy: report native image dimensions honestly; normalize body illustrations to 1920x1080 and cover images to 2520x1080 only when strict delivery size is requested
delivery.text_fidelity_policy: try shorter required text and regeneration first; if exact Chinese remains wrong, use deterministic text overlay on the accepted generated base image
